sections.title: A: Original word formation practice
sections.instructions: Use the word clue to form the best word for each original gap.

items.sentence: Mia prepared an original word formation task on Review: Block 3 – Units 5 & 6. Complete the gaps in order during the class project: (1) ......, (2) ......, (3) .......

sections.title: B: Original key word transformation practice
sections.instructions: Complete the second sentence so that it keeps the same meaning as the first.

items.sentence:
Mia began the class project before the lesson on Review: Block 3 – Units 5 & 6. **MAGIC**
The class project ...... before the lesson on Review: Block 3 – Units 5 & 6.

Leo began the study group before the lesson on Review: Block 3 – Units 5 & 6. **FLYING**
The study group ...... before the lesson on Review: Block 3 – Units 5 & 6.
items.answer: got off to a flying start

items.sentence:
Sara began the exam workshop before the lesson on Review: Block 3 – Units 5 & 6. **AGAIN**
The exam workshop ...... before the lesson on Review: Block 3 – Units 5 & 6.

Tom began the online lesson before the lesson on Review: Block 3 – Units 5 & 6. **END**
The online lesson ...... before the lesson on Review: Block 3 – Units 5 & 6.

Nina began the school club before the lesson on Review: Block 3 – Units 5 & 6. **AGE**
The school club ...... before the lesson on Review: Block 3 – Units 5 & 6.

Oscar began the revision session before the lesson on Review: Block 3 – Units 5 & 6. **POINT**
The revision session ...... before the lesson on Review: Block 3 – Units 5 & 6.

Iris began the practice notebook before the lesson on Review: Block 3 – Units 5 & 6. **SECOND**
The practice notebook ...... before the lesson on Review: Block 3 – Units 5 & 6.
items.answer: will only take a second to

items.sentence:
Ben began the language lab before the lesson on Review: Block 3 – Units 5 & 6. **HAT**
The language lab ...... before the lesson on Review: Block 3 – Units 5 & 6.
items.answer: at the drop of a hat
